intent.summary: Cache session lookups in Redis to cut auth latency

checks.name: integration-tests
checks.summary: 3 failures in session-revocation.spec.ts: revoked sessions stay valid until cache TTL

lesson.summary: Caching sessions by ID breaks revocation: a revoked session stays valid until TTL expiry. Any session cache here must be invalidated on the revocation path (or key on a generation counter), not just expire. The next attempt should start from the revocation path, not the cache.
